scripts.store-all: set AWS_REGION='eu-central-1' && set tableName='prod-stablecoins-table' && npx ts-node --transpile-only src/cli/storeAllPeggedAssets.ts
scripts.force-update: set AWS_REGION='eu-central-1' && set tableName='prod-stablecoins-table' && npx ts-node --transpile-only src/cli/forceUpdateAsset.ts
scripts.fillOld: set AWS_REGION='eu-central-1' && set tableName='prod-stablecoins-table' && npx ts-node src/cli/fillOld.ts
scripts.fillLast: export AWS_REGION='eu-central-1' && export tableName='prod-stablecoins-table' && npx ts-node src/cli/fillLast.ts
